data.keyword: Which Louisville providers help teens with anxiety, depression, or trauma?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode expanded Which Louisville providers help teens with anxiety, depression, or trauma?

result.keyword: Which Louisville providers help teens with anxiety, depression, or trauma?

items.markdown:
Several providers in Louisville offer specialized care for teens dealing with anxiety, depression, or trauma. These include hospitals with dedicated adolescent units, specialized psychology practices, and outpatient behavioral health services.[[1]](https://recovery.com/louisville/adolescents/)[[2]](https://www.turningwinds.com/adolescent-treatment-programs-for-teens-in-louisville-ky-that-take-insurance/)[[3]](https://thebrookhospitals.com/programs/teens/psychiatric-inpatient/)

Here are key providers found in Louisville, KY:

- **[UofL Health – Peace Hospital](https://uoflhealth.org/services/mental-and-behavioral-health/):** Offers mental and behavioral health services for children and adolescents, including a no-charge assessment for depression symptoms, psychiatric services, and therapy.[](https://uoflhealth.org/services/mental-and-behavioral-health/) [[1]](https://uoflhealth.org/services/mental-and-behavioral-health/)
- **The Brook Hospital – KMI:** Provides a [structured Adolescent Psychiatric Inpatient Program](https://thebrookhospitals.com/programs/teens/psychiatric-inpatient/) for teens aged 13–17, focusing on depression, anxiety, trauma, and mood disorders, featuring 24-hour care, psychiatric evaluation, and crisis stabilization.[](https://thebrookhospitals.com/programs/teens/psychiatric-inpatient/) [[1]](https://thebrookhospitals.com/programs/teens/psychiatric-inpatient/)
- **[Norton Healthcare Behavioral Medicine Services](https://nortonhealthcare.com/services-and-conditions/behavioral-health/services/):** Treats common teen mental health issues like anxiety, depression, and PTSD through a team of therapists, psychologists, and psychiatrists.[](https://nortonhealthcare.com/services-and-conditions/behavioral-health/services/) [[1]](https://nortonhealthcare.com/services-and-conditions/behavioral-health/services/)
- **[Louisville Grace Psychological Services](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/):** Provides child therapy and psychology for anxiety, depression, and trauma using evidence-based practices like Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) and Exposure and Response Prevention (ERP).[](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/) [[1]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/)[[2]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/teen-therapy-louisville/)[[3]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/erp-therapy-ocd-louisville/)[[4]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/complex-ptsd-understanding-the-nuances-of-chronic-trauma/)
- **[Psychology Today Directory](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/psychiatrists/ky/louisville?category=adolescents-teenagers-14-to-19):** Lists numerous private practice psychiatrists in Louisville specializing in adolescent medication management for ADHD, anxiety, and depression.[](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/psychiatrists/ky/louisville?category=adolescents-teenagers-14-to-19) [[1]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/psychiatrists/ky/louisville?category=adolescents-teenagers-14-to-19)[[2]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/psychiatrists/co/louisville)

**Key Treatment Approaches Offered in Louisville:** 

- **Inpatient Programs:** For severe, immediate crises (e.g., The Brook).
- **Outpatient Therapy/Medication Management:** For ongoing care (e.g., Norton Healthcare, private practitioners).
- **Trauma/Anxiety Specific:** CBT, play therapy, and ERP are frequently used by local child psychologists.[](https://thebrookhospitals.com/programs/teens/psychiatric-inpatient/) [[1]](https://thebrookhospitals.com/programs/teens/psychiatric-inpatient/)[[2]](https://nortonhealthcare.com/services-and-conditions/behavioral-health/services/)[[3]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/child-therapist-louisville-ky/)[[4]](https://missionprephealthcare.com/blog/virginia-adolescent-mental-health-facilities-options-how-to-choose-the-right-one/)[[5]](https://basepointacademy.com/locations/dallas/balch-springs/)

Would you like me to find which of these providers accept **Medicaid** , or perhaps focus on finding a provider for **specific, in-person therapy** rather than medication management?
